name: pr-autopilot
description: Complete multi-agent dev pipeline. v0.5 adds the pre-PR lifecycle (atomic assignment claim, spec drafting, multi-channel pre-PR review, user-approved TDD gate) on top of v0.4's post-PR review loop. v0.5.1 polishes /review-spec: --bootstrap mode (no claim file required), Composer fenced-block UX, cursor-cloud-agent plan probe, status-table progress visibility. Pick an assignment, walk away, come back when it's merged.
